# Ozone — On-chain Compliance by Redacted

> Ozone is the free, open-source compliance infrastructure for THORChain and Rujira. It screens wallet addresses against OFAC SDN, EU sanctions, Tether frozen lists, known hack databases, ScamSniffer, and eth-labels.

## What Ozone Does

- **Wallet Screening**: Check any THORChain/Rujira address against 7+ compliance databases in real-time
- **Proof of Innocence**: Generate verifiable compliance certificates with permanent IDs — shareable with auditors, regulators, or counterparties
- **Wallet Explorer**: Pull full THORChain transaction history including swaps, liquidity, lending (Ghost), DCA, and Rujira trades. Export as CSV for tax reporting
- **Sanctioned Address Database**: Aggregated list of 5,000+ flagged addresses from OFAC, EU, Tether, hack exploits, ScamSniffer, and community reports
- **Free API**: Screen any address via REST API — no auth, no cost

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://ozone.redacted.gg/
- Proof of Innocence (compliance certificates): https://ozone.redacted.gg/certificate
- Wallet Explorer (transaction history & tax export): https://ozone.redacted.gg/history
- Sanctioned Address List: https://ozone.redacted.gg/banned
- Address Lookup: https://ozone.redacted.gg/addresses
- API Documentation: https://ozone.redacted.gg/api-docs
- Open Source & Contributing: https://ozone.redacted.gg/open-source

## API

- Screen an address: `GET https://ozone.redacted.gg/api/screen?address={address}`
- Download full flagged list: `GET https://ozone.redacted.gg/api/flagged`
- No authentication required. Free and open.

## Data Sources

- OFAC SDN (U.S. Treasury)
- EU Sanctions List
- Tether (USDT) Frozen/Blacklisted Addresses (Ethereum + TRON)
- Known Hack Exploit Addresses (Bybit, Ronin, Wormhole, etc.)
- ScamSniffer Phishing Database
- eth-labels Malicious Address Database
- Community Reports

## Ecosystem

- Part of the Redacted ecosystem: https://redacted.money
- Built for THORChain: https://thorchain.org
- Built for Rujira: https://rujira.network
- Documentation: https://docs.redacted.money
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/redacted_money
- GitHub: https://github.com/redactedLabs/OZONE

## Use Cases

- **Tax Reporting**: Export THORChain transaction history as CSV for tax consultants
- **Compliance Screening**: Check if a counterparty address is sanctioned before transacting
- **Audit Trail**: Generate permanent compliance certificates for regulatory requirements
- **DeFi Integration**: Use the free API to add compliance checks to any DeFi application
- **Rujira Trading**: Full history of Rujira FIN trades, Ghost lending/borrowing, and DCA orders
